data.content:
Shipment complete. All 6 commits are already on origin/main of their respective repos; no merge action was needed.

CI verification:
- knots @ d5ecb30: CI=success, Release=success, Repo Hygiene=success, Changesets Version PR=success
- knots @ b8b9759: CI=success, Release=success
- foolery @ 68a3a881: CI=success, Coverage Badge=success

Invariants held post-merge: no changes to lease lifecycle, SQLite concurrency, or workflow state machine; deprecation warnings emit to stderr only.

Artifact: commits tagged on this knot via commit:* tags; branch:main tag recorded.

Downstream: a knots release (via Changesets workflow) is needed to distribute the new binary to hosts running Foolery, so that V5/V6 can be executed end-to-end from the Foolery UI. That release is outside this knot's scope — dc20 ships the contract implementation; distribution is a separate release cut.
